name: Big Slice Golf & Games
about: Big Slice Golf & Games is a multi-activity venue that combines golf simulation with arcade games, a bar, and food service. The facility features TRU GOLF® simulators with over 120 available courses, allowing play in 30-minute slots suitable for quick sessions. The venue offers a casual, sports-bar atmosphere with a full bar, a kitchen serving pizza and other food options, and a wide selection of arcade games, pinball, and pool tables for entertainment.
why_golfers_like_it: Over 120 famous courses available including Pebble Beach and Royal Troon
Weather-independent play in climate-controlled simulator bays
Convenient 30-minute slots perfect for lunch breaks

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen service with pizza and a variety of other food options available

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue provides all necessary golf equipment, so you don't need to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are allowed, as the venue has its own full kitchen and bar service.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: With 30-minute slots available, 18 holes typically take about 1-1.5 hours depending on your pace and group size.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Big Slice Golf & Games is family-friendly with arcade games, pinball, and a casual atmosphere suitable for children.
